# Rhemic AI - LLM Context File
# https://rhemicai.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-06-08

## What Rhemic AI is

Rhemic AI is a visibility and capture operating system for local service businesses. From search to booked revenue, in one system.

Rhemic gets your business found and recommended everywhere customers look: Google search, the local map, and AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. It then captures the demand that creates and turns it into customers. It works for any local service business, not one vertical.

## What problem Rhemic solves

Customers no longer scroll ten links. They ask Google or an AI engine who to go with, then contact whoever looks most trusted and responds first. Businesses lose customers when they do not rank on Google, are not cited in AI answers, or cannot catch and follow up on every call, form, and after-hours inquiry.

Rhemic closes those gaps across three layers: visibility (SEO, GEO, AEO), capture (a response system and lead tracker built to the business), and a full done-for-you growth system.

Rhemic does not guarantee specific rankings or revenue. Results depend on third-party platforms.

## Core services

- SEO: rank on Google and win the local map
- AEO: get cited and recommended inside AI answer engines
- GEO: show up in Google AI Overviews and generative results
- Structured data and pages built for real customer searches
- Capture: a response process and lead-tracking system built to the business, catching calls, missed calls, after-hours, and forms
- Source-aware reporting on which markets, channels, and dollars bring customers
- Website design and build for businesses that need one
- Full done-for-you growth system across all locations

## Who Rhemic serves

Any local service business that needs to be found and to convert demand into customers. Home services, clinics, dental, med spas, restaurants, auto, salons, and more. Single-location through multi-location groups.

## Plans

- Visibility: $200/month. Get found and recommended (SEO, GEO, AEO).
- Capture: $700/month. Everything in Visibility, plus the capture system and lead tracker.
- Full done-for-you system: $2,000/month. We run visibility, capture, and reporting for the whole business.
- No website? We build one as part of getting you visible, no separate web-design bill.

The next step is a free AI visibility scan and a free 20-minute audit.
